data.name: Claiming the Noble Elf Mother
data.detailed_description:
Claiming the Noble Elf Mother is a linear, story-driven adult visual novel set in a rigid elven society where status defines everything.

You play as Noah, a low-born servant trapped at the very bottom of the social hierarchy. Serving noble elves means enduring constant humiliation, cruelty, and quiet contempt from those who see him as disposable labor.

Years of suppressed anger, resentment, and forbidden desire begin to surface.

What starts as silent obedience slowly evolves into something far more dangerous — a journey shaped by temptation, shifting power dynamics, and morally complex relationships. As Noah navigates the noble household, boundaries blur and tensions rise, especially when he becomes entangled with a noble elf mother whose presence challenges everything he once believed was untouchable.

This is a linear adult visual novel experience, focused on immersive storytelling, character development, and emotional tension. The story unfolds through fully illustrated scenes, expressive character portraits, and dialogue-driven progression.

🔥 What You Can Expect

A linear narrative structure (no branching paths)

Story-focused progression with character-driven development

Adult themes and mature content (18+)

Original background music and atmosphere-enhancing sound design

Animated scene and scene transitions

Approx. 1-+ hours of gameplay

Is this a story of revenge?

A twisted romance?

Or the awakening of desires that were never meant to exist?

data.short_description: Claiming the Noble Elf Mother is a story-driven adult visual novel. Play as Noah, a low-born servant in a rigid elven society, enduring cruelty from nobles as desire and resentment grow. Power shifts, forbidden attraction, and blurred boundaries shape his dangerous ascent.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows .7,8,10,11 (64-bit) and (32-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (3rd gen) / AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • 備註: Designed for keyboard and mouse. Gamepad support is optional.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or dedicated GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • 備註: Designed for keyboard and mouse. Gamepad support is optional.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU (Metal supported)
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Supports both Intel and Apple Silicon (Universal build).
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU or better
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Supports both Intel and Apple Silicon (Universal build).

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS / SteamOS
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.2 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Tested on Steam Deck and desktop Linux.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS / SteamOS
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.1 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Tested on Steam Deck and desktop Linux.
